. But when can one say that a certain dataflow model faithfully captures a given piece of hardware? The question is investigated in this paper. Finite state machines with synchronous semantics are used to model hardware. Asynchronous processes commun

d to model hardware. Asynchronous processes communicating via queues are employed for dataflow. A conformance relation between these two heterogeneous models of computation is developed that preserves performance properties such as worst-case through
